lines.en_lit: If offering, I derive even consecrated for Temple maintenance which are called offering, as it is stated: “And we have brought the Lord’s offering, the verse states: “And has not brought it to the entrance to the Tent of Meeting” any fit the entrance to the Tent of Meeting one is liable for it outside any that is not fit the entrance to the Tent of Meeting, one is not liable for it outside

I exclude these which are not fit the entrance to the Tent of Meeting and I will not exclude the heifer of a purification offering and scapegoat, which are fit to come to the entrance to the Tent of Meeting. the verse states “to the Lord” those that are designated exclusively for God These, are excluded, as they are not designated exclusively for God
Does “to the Lord” to exclude? raises a contradiction it may be accepted as an offering by fire to the Lord” These are by fire,
From where that he may not consecrate lacking time, The verse states: An offering, To the Lord to include the scapegoat,

Rava said There in the context of the verse and here in the context of the verse. There, where To the entrance, to include To the Lord to exclude. here, where by fire to exclude, To the Lord to include.
The reason is because the Merciful One included But had it not included I would have said: The scapegoat consecrated when lacking time. Isn’t the lottery establishes only fit to God?
Rav Yosef said: whose is this It is Ḥanan the Egyptian, as it was taught Ḥanan the Egyptian says: Even blood in the cup, he brings a counterpart and pairs it with
Say that you heard Ḥanan the Egyptian that he does not rejected. Did you hear him that he does not lottery Perhaps brings and draws lots,
Rather, Rav Yosef said: whose is this? It is Rabbi Shimon, as it was taught If one of dies, he brings another without a lottery; the statement of Rabbi Shimon.
Ravina said where became blemished and they redeemed it with another.
From where do you say that is disqualified blemish? As it was taught nor make by fire of them these are the fats
I have only all from where some of them? The verse states “of them,” “The altar”; this is sprinkling the blood “to the Lord” to include the scapegoat,

And necessary to write a blemished and necessary to write lacking time. Since if the Merciful One had written lacking time, because its time has not come However, a blemished whose time has arrived, say not And if the Merciful One had written that a blemished because abhorrent However, lacking time, which is not abhorrent, say not necessary
